---
title: "Aunt Charlotte's Stories of English History for the little ones"
year: 1873
slug: "Aunt_English"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


#### Online text ofAunt Charlotte's Stories of English History

[Click here to reach the latest version of*Aunt Charlotte's Stories of English History*online from Gutenberg](http://digital.library.upenn.edu/webbin/gutbook/lookup?num=4769)  
(Many thanks to Doug Levy and the Gutenberg team)

Yonge's*Aunt Charlotte's Stories of English History*is available on microfiche from**The Nineteenth Century**(this site gives you free access to an online catalogue of over 25,000 nineteenth-century works available on microfiche)

#### Aunt Charlotte's Stories of English History

#### Chapter titles

1. Julius Caesar. B.C. 55.

2. The Romans in Britain. A.D. 41혯418.

3. The Angle Children. A.D. 597.

4. The Northmen. A.D. 858혯958.

5. The Danish Conquest. A.D. 958혯1035.

6. The Norman Conquest. A.D. 1035혯1066.

7. William the Conqueror. A.D. 1066혯1087.

8. William II., Rufus. A.D. 1087혯1100.

9. Henry I., Beau-Clerc. A.D. 1100혯1135.

10. Stephen. A.D. 1135혯1154.

11. Henry II., Fitz-Empress. A.D. 1154혯1189.

12. Richard I., Lion-Heart. A.D. 1189혯1199.

13. John, Lackland. A.D. 1199혯1216.

14. Henry III., of Winchester. A.D. 1216혯1272.

15. Edward I., Longshanks. A.D. 1272혯1307.

16. Edward II., of Caernarvon. A.D. 1307혯1327.

17. Edward III. A.D. 1327혯1377.

18. Richard II. A.D. 1377혯1399.

19. Henry IV. A.D. 1399혯1413.

20. Henry V., of Monmouth. A.D. 1413혯1423.

21. Henry VI., of Windsor. A.D. 1423혯1461.

22. Edward IV. A.D. 1461혯1483.

23. Edward V. A.D. 1483.

24. Richard III. A.D. 1483혯1485.

25. Henry VII. A.D. 1485혯1509.

26. Henry VIII. and Cardinal Wolsey. A.D. 1509혯1529.

27. Henry VIII. and his Wives. A.D. 1528혯1547.

28. Edward VI. A.D. 1547혯1553.

29. Mary I. A.D. 1553혯1558.

30. Elizabeth. A.D. 1558혯1587.

31. Elizabeth (continued). A.D. 1587혯1602.

32. James I., A.D. 1602혯1625.

33. Charles I., A.D. 1625혯1645.

34. The Long Parliament. A.D. 1649.

35. Death of Charles I. A.D. 1649혯1651.

36. Oliver Cromwell. A.D. 1649혯1660.

37. Charles II. A.D. 1660혯1685.

38. James II. A.D. 1685혯1688.

39. William III., and Mary II. A.D. 1689혯1702.

40. Anne. A.D. 1702혯1714.

41. George I. A.D. 1714혯1725.

42. George II. A.D. 1725혯1760.

43. George III. A.D. 1760혯1785.

44. George III. (continued). A.D. 1785혯1810.

45. George III. The Regency. A.D. 1810혯1820.

46. George IV. A.D. 1820-1839.

47. William IV. A.D. 1830혯1837.

48. Victoria. A.D. 1837혯1855.

49. Victoria (continued). A.D. 1855혯1860.

50. Victoria (continued). A.D. 1860혯1872.
